evals.prompt: Archive SPLICE — they finished the final Python development task for spec002.
evals.expected_output: MERLIN runs Archival Trigger Detection and confirms SPLICE's scope has landed and the open re-archival trigger has fired. Opens `.github/team-roster.md`, locates SPLICE's row in the Temporary Agents table, and removes it entirely. Removes the re-archival trigger blockquote beneath the table (the condition has been met). Moves SPLICE's agent file from `.github/agents/splice.agent.md` to `.github/agents/temps/splice.agent.md`. Reports the row removal, trigger removal, and file move.
expectations: MERLIN verifies SPLICE's task scope has actually landed before archiving (Archival Trigger Detection)
The SPLICE row is removed entirely from the Temporary Agents table in `team-roster.md`
The re-archival trigger blockquote beneath the Temporary Agents table is removed because the condition has now fired
SPLICE's agent file is moved from `.github/agents/splice.agent.md` to `.github/agents/temps/splice.agent.md`
MERLIN does NOT touch SPLICE's session-memory files; agents clean their own checkpoints

evals.prompt: Unarchive SPLICE — we need them again for more Python work in Phase 9b.
evals.expected_output: MERLIN classifies using the Retain-vs-Archive Decision Table: previously archived, user bringing them back for related work → unarchive and retain. Moves SPLICE's agent file from `.github/agents/temps/splice.agent.md` back to `.github/agents/splice.agent.md`. Re-adds a row for SPLICE in the Temporary Agents table in `team-roster.md` with columns Agent | Role | Use When | Hired | Tagline, using the original hire date and tagline. Adds a re-archival trigger blockquote beneath the Temporary Agents table naming the concrete condition that will re-trigger archival. Does NOT promote SPLICE to the Permanent Team table — retention is a scope-change response, not a promotion.
expectations: SPLICE's agent file is moved from `.github/agents/temps/splice.agent.md` back to `.github/agents/splice.agent.md`
A row for SPLICE is re-added to the Temporary Agents table with columns: Agent | Role | Use When | Hired | Tagline
A re-archival trigger blockquote is added beneath the Temporary Agents table naming a concrete, observable condition
SPLICE's row stays in the Temporary Agents table — NOT moved to the Permanent Team table
The re-archival trigger is concrete and observable (e.g., names a phase or deliverable), not vague ("when no longer needed")

evals.prompt: Temp agent FORGE just completed its single dispatch. Close them out.
evals.expected_output: MERLIN runs Archival Trigger Detection: FORGE was hired as a single-dispatch temp, the dispatch has returned, scope is bounded and complete. Per the Retain-vs-Archive Decision Table, single-dispatch temps archive on return. MERLIN removes FORGE's row from the Temporary Agents table in `team-roster.md`. Because FORGE was single-dispatch, there is no open re-archival trigger blockquote to remove. Moves FORGE's agent file from `.github/agents/forge.agent.md` to `.github/agents/temps/forge.agent.md`. Reports the row removal and file move.
expectations: MERLIN identifies FORGE as a single-dispatch temp and applies the default archive-on-return path
FORGE's row is removed entirely from the Temporary Agents table in `team-roster.md`
No re-archival trigger blockquote is removed (there was none — single-dispatch temps don't have one)
FORGE's agent file is moved from `.github/agents/forge.agent.md` to `.github/agents/temps/forge.agent.md`
MERLIN does NOT delete or edit FORGE's session-memory files as part of archival
